findings.evidence: name matches read heuristic; no mcp:read-only annotation
findings.note: Name matches the heuristic but the body mutates: report always writes an HTML/PDF file to disk (os.WriteFile) and, with --post-slack, posts to Slack. A false readOnlyHint:true would tell MCP hosts to skip the permission prompt on a file-writing, Slack-posting command. Annotation deliberately omitted.
Standard framework 'version' command (in the MCP framework-skip set, not exposed as an MCP tool); 'Print version' is accurate and complete for the human --help reader
